title: crataegus iracunda var. silvicola
intro: Crataegus iracunda var. silvicola is a specific variety of the hawthorn plant, known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins (OPCs), and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits, including cardiovascular health, anti-inflammatory properties, and antioxidant effects. Traditional herbal preparations of Crataegus iracunda var. silvicola include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support heart health, lower blood pressure, and improve overall well-being. Regular consumption of this plant is believed to promote cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of heart disease, and potentially lower the risk of certain types of cancer.
